message:
feat(crates): ASUPERSYNC runtime migration across 7 internal crates

fcp-async-core:
- Minor API surface adjustments for downstream compatibility

fcp-store (gc, object_store, symbol_store, repair, integration tests):
- tokio::runtime::Builder::new_current_thread() → fcp_async_core::runtime::block_on_sync()
  across all 3 store modules and integration test harness
- Eliminates 4-line runtime construction boilerplate per test helper

fcp-mesh (node.rs):
- Same tokio runtime → block_on_sync migration across 5 test functions
- All symbol request and quarantine tests updated

fcp-ratelimit (leaky_bucket, sliding_window, token_bucket, fcp):
- tokio::time::sleep → fcp_async_core::time::sleep
- #[tokio::test] → #[fcp_async_core::runtime::test] across all test suites
- fcp-async-core dependency added to Cargo.toml

fcp-telemetry (context.rs):
- tokio::task_local! → fcp_async_core::task_local!
- #[tokio::test] → #[fcp_async_core::runtime::test] (10 tests)

fcp-cli (install, new):
- Minor ASUPERSYNC compatibility adjustments

fcp-host (doctor.rs):
- Minor test adjustments for ASUPERSYNC compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@ serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
 sha2.workspace = true
 textwrap = "0.16"
-tokio.workspace = true
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../fcp-async-core" }
 toml.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
@@ -48,6 +48,7 @@ ed25519-dalek.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 assert_cmd = "2.0"
+tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"] }
 insta = { version = "1.40", features = ["json", "redactions"] }
 predicates = "3.1"
 tempfile = "3.14"
